title: The Tenant's Guide to Moving out of Government-Owned (Kebele) Properties to Modern Condos
excerpt: Moving from kebele government housing to modern condos: tenant guide, handover procedures, documentation, utility transfer, lifestyle transition Addis Ababa.
content:
The tenant's guide to moving out of government-owned (kebele) properties to modern condos

Graduating from kebele-assigned housing to a modern condo is lifestyle leap—generator rules, elevator bookings, and management fees replace informal neighbor arrangements. Move-out from government-owned property carries documentation steps: clearance letters, utility settlement, and handover that unlocks deposit or next assignment while new condo demands parallel registration before truck arrives.

This guide helps tenants move from kebele properties to modern condominiums in Addis Ababa.

Kebele move-out documentation

  • Notify housing office per policy—written application if required.
  • Final utility readings and payment receipts.
  • Joint inspection with kebele representative when scheduled.
  • Return occupancy documents or ID cards issued for unit.
  • Clearance letter before keys—keep copy for records.

Condition and community handover

Photo unit empty; minor repairs per obligation. Inform iddir chair of departure—courtesy eases future family references. No abandonment of unwanted furniture in corridor—compound fine risk.

Modern condo move-in parallel track

Management registration; elevator book; move permit; security deposit to new building. Bylaws on move hours and floor protection—read before booking Active Movers.

Lifestyle inventory shift

Villa-scale furniture may not fit condo—measure elevator and doors. Sell or donate oversize before truck quote. Storage unit bridge if downsizing incomplete.

Utility transition

Close kebele-era accounts; open condo-meter accounts—Ethio telecom and electric covered in separate guide. Internet lead time two weeks common.

Financial planning

Condo service charge monthly budget new line. Parking slot fee. Generator maintenance share in some towers.

Family and school

Children school transfer documents; commute test from new condo to campus.

Moving day sequencing

Kebele handover morning if same-day; condo unload afternoon—or separate days reduce chaos. Color-coded boxes essential first condo move.

Active Movers dual-address moves

Quote two-stop or single day multi-leg—disclose kebele stair access and condo elevator dims.

Conclusion

Kebele to condo transition succeeds with housing office clearance, condo management pre-booking, rightsized inventory, and utility parallel setup—modern living starts when paperwork and truck align same week.
author: Active Movers Team
